title: HugoSMP
description: A (unofficial) performance-focused modpack specifically optimized for the HugoSMP server, featuring allowed quality-of-life improvements and visual enhancements.
body:
# **About Hugo SMP Modpack**
This is an **unofficial**, community-made modpack designed specifically for players on the **HugoSMP** server. The goal of this pack is to provide the best possible performance and visual experience while strictly adhering to server rules.

Key Features:
- **Performance**: Fully optimized with mods like Sodium and Lithium to ensure high FPS and smooth gameplay.
- **Fair Play**: Contains zero cheats or blacklisted mods. All included features are purely for quality-of-life or client-side aesthetics.
- **Visuals**: Enhanced graphics and subtle UI improvements to make your SMP experience more immersive.
- **Connection**: Pre-configured settings to make joining and playing on the HugoSMP server as easy as possible.

**Why use this pack?**
Instead of installing dozens of mods manually, this pack gives you a "one-click" solution to have everything you need for the server, ensuring you don't accidentally install anything that could get you banned.
